mapper.select: SELECT A.slug, A.title, A.view_count AS viewCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM article_favorites AF WHERE AF.article_id = A.id) AS favoriteCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments C WHERE C.article_id = A.id) AS commentCount, CAST(julianday('now') - julianday(A.created_at) AS INTEGER) AS daysSincePublished FROM articles A WHERE A.slug = #{slug}

SELECT A.id, A.slug, A.title, A.description, COUNT(AF.user_id) AS favoriteCount FROM articles A INNER JOIN article_favorites AF ON A.id = AF.article_id WHERE AF.created_at >= datetime('now', '-' || #{days} || ' days') GROUP BY A.id, A.slug, A.title, A.description ORDER BY favoriteCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
